w11339ab1c23c15c15c27c13.ParameterGroups.Docs: A list of parameter group types, where you specify group names, the parameters in each group, and the order in which the parameters are shown.

w11339ab1c23c15c15c27c13.ParameterLabels.Docs: A mapping of parameters and their friendly names that the CloudFormation console shows when a stack is created or updated.
